# AppDistributor

**Enumeration**

Options that describe the marketplace from which the app installs.

## Declaration

```swift
enum AppDistributor
```

## Overview

Apps on alternative app marketplaces need to use APIs that vary from apps on the App Store. Specifically, use:

- [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AdAttributionKit] for ads.
- An e-commerce solution other than the App Store’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/in-app-purchase] system.
- A social gaming network other than [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/game-center] unless your app is also on the App Store.
- [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BackgroundAssets] to download large files in the background rather than [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/FileManagement/Conceptual/On_Demand_Resources_Guide/].

Only use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit] on the App Store.

To observe API differences, check the value of the app distributor’s static ([doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppDistributor/current]) property to determine the installation source:



For more information, see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/marketplacekit/distributing-your-app-on-an-alternative-marketplace].

## Enumeration Cases

- **AppDistributor.appStore**
- **AppDistributor.marketplace(_:)**
- **AppDistributor.other**
- **AppDistributor.testFlight**
- **AppDistributor.web**

## Type Properties

- **current**: The source from which the app installs.
